composition_pattern: raw-normalization -> priority-inference -> owner-lookup -> SLA-computation -> breach-flags -> part-cost-lookup -> exception-review -> customer-notice-release -> dashboard-repair -> validation-highlight-hide-reorder
user_task_description: A field-service closeout workbook needs a long, ordered release workflow from raw tickets into a release-safe dashboard, exception register, and customer notice pack.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Replace the stale dashboard; create Release Queue, Exception Review, and Customer Notices; preserve source lookup sheets; populate the release queue from Raw Intake; infer priority; map owners and SLA hours; compute age hours and breach flags using Dashboard!B2; map part costs; generate escalation reasons and customer notices; suppress internal notes; create exception and notice tables; repair dashboard formulas; add native tables, validation, freeze panes, highlights, release ordering, and hidden raw/scratch/archive sheets.
atomic_scope: Single-document long-flow workflow with ordered dependent operations; preserve source data while creating publishable derived sheets.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: Excel operational reporting pain: lookup formulas, validations, conditional formatting, and dashboards
Microsoft Excel support topics for tables, data validation, formulas, and conditional formatting
